description: The luxe comfort and rugged styling of woodland's shoes are now replicated in its sandals. Created for those who love the comfort of floaters but hate the city dust on their feet. Wear these with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style.UpperStrap on the forefoot and around the ankle with velcro closuresClosed toe detail connected to the forefoot strapCushioned footbed with plush leather OutsoleDurable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute grip and traction on various surfaces, with a curved midfootSandal careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
